title: Crumbly Middle Eastern Sea Bass Crumble
description: A herbal crumbly Middle Eastern-inspired dish featuring sea bass fillets steamed to perfection in a bed of aromatic herbs and spices for a romantic twist that's also vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Pat dry the sea bass fillets with paper towels and season them lightly on both sides with salt and pepper.
In a small skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add minced onion, dill, cilantro, mint, turmeric, and garam masala. Cook for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
Place the seasoned sea bass fillets in a baking dish. Spoon the herb mixture evenly on top of each fillet.
Pour enough water into the baking dish to reach about half-way up the sides of the fish fillets (about 1/4 inch).
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes. Remove the foil, brush the top with olive oil, and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
Remove from oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
